Commander '''Rosk''' was the navigator on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaught]] ''[[Pride of the Senate]]''. He served under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{1st}}
